mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.name, g.english_name AS english_name, g.description, g.brand_id, b.name AS brand_name, g.series_id, s.name AS series_name, g.category_id, c.name AS category_name, g.maker_id, m.name AS maker_name, g.is_hot, g.sort, g.status, CASE WHEN g.status = 1 THEN 'Normal' WHEN g.status = 0 THEN 'Disabled' ELSE NULL END AS status_desc, gs.id AS sku_id, gs.sku_code, gs.sku_name, gs.price, gs.currency
ORDER BY g.sort ASC, g.update_time DESC, g.id ASC, gs.update_time DESC, gs.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
